title: Canon XV.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: A subdeacon is not to be ordained under twenty years of age.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: And if any one in any grade of the priesthood shall have been ordained contrary to the prescribed time let him be deposed.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Those shall be chosen as Subdeacons who are twenty years of age.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: This age seems first to have been fixed by the Second Council of Toledo (circa, a.d.
